# knievel-ruby

Auto-generated Ruby client for the [Knievel](https://github.com/knievel-ads/knievel) ad-serving platform.

Regenerated by `.github/workflows/release-ruby-gem.yml` in `knievel-ads/knievel` on every `v*` tag push, using `openapi-generator` against the server's committed `openapi.yaml`. Each regeneration commits and tags a matching version here.

**Do not edit generated files directly** — they are overwritten on the next regeneration. The OpenAPI generator config lives in `knievel`'s `.github/ruby-client/` and is copied in on every run; the `.openapi-generator-ignore` in this repo (after first run) controls which files survive regeneration.

## Usage (pre-RubyGems publish)

```ruby
# Gemfile
gem 'knievel', git: 'https://github.com/knievel-ads/knievel-ruby', tag: 'v0.0.1'
```

RubyGems publish is deferred to Phase 4.10 proper, alongside the hand-written `Resource` wrappers and `Enumerable` pagination.
